hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'git\s+push\s+.*--force|git\s+push\s+-f\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is not allowed. Push normally or ask the user first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'sqlite3\s+data/drift\.db.*(DELETE|UPDATE|INSERT|DROP|ALTER)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Direct DB writes via sqlite3 are not allowed. Use pipeline scripts or Alembic migrations.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf\s+[^d]' | grep -qvE 'data/pipeline/(cache|tmp)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf outside pipeline cache dirs. Use a safer approach or ask the user.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(py)$'; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(src/|tests/|scripts/)'; then cd /Users/brianbolze/Development/software/shooting && .venv/bin/black --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && .venv/bin/isort --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'src/drift/models/|src/drift/schemas/|alembic/versions/'; then echo 'You edited a model, schema, or migration file. Check if .claude/skills/ docs (SQL queries, column names, table references) or TODO.md need updating.'; fi; exit 0

echo 'Context was compacted. Reminders: (1) Run make format && make lint && make test before committing. (2) Use make pipeline-store for dry-run before make pipeline-store-commit. (3) Manufacturer names need EntityAlias, never raw string match. (4) bullet_diameter_inches is a float, not an FK. (5) Log tech debt discoveries to TODO.md.'
